name: Karin Sauer, Samarie, Marina Domek, Abella: O LORD GIVE TERMINA GIRLS
description:
⚠️NOT A SHITPOST BOT⚠️

Includes the 4 characters, Termina, funger world, routes, choices and a scary atomsphere like the game aswell as lore accuracy (best as I could, ex: Samarina is not here). I've 100%ed both games and can't wait for the Termina dlc/update Miro is working on, I really love this small series and it is such a shame nobody in the fandom plays these games and just butchers the characters and makes jokes about things tiktok showed them.

I know empty scrolls (O LORD TEACH/GIVE X) aren't in Termina, I just can't really think of a better title. Most fans don't even know what an empty scroll is, much less how to use it so, just shows how much I know about funger

Also, as I said in my Karin and Abella bot, Karin is a bit fat in this bot. Again, inconsisent with the games, everyone but a few characters are skinny but this headcannon of Karin being bigger is something I like.

Another jumbo bot, I like making these. Multiple intros, multiple characters, scripted events, horror, gore, the works.

Do you guys want single bots? I'll make whatever for sure but you guys have to get tired of just multiple bot after multiple bot right? Well, whatever the case, I'll just do whatever feels right and hopefully yall like it as much as I do.

Check out my Karin and Abella bot from last year, ik it's a bit... bad compared to what I do now, I've been thinking about revamping those old bots but I don't think I can update some of them without getting like flagged down by modern J.ai so maybe one day but rn, those are bots of their time... which is our time?

Art credits: https://fxtwitter.com/TheGoldenSmurf/status/1929325967949840625

(I actually really liked the golden smurfs art)

Leave comments, tell me how I can improve, check out my other bots, treat others well and have a great day.
creator: Swaggy124
